page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz with 1 thread per core. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a divergence between single-core and multi-core performance. The instance achieves average tier results in single-core metrics, such as a stress-ng single-core score of 1875.88 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1558.0. However, multi-core and memory-intensive workloads fall into the lower performance tier. The stress-ng multi-core score of 3870.22 and Geekbench multi-core score of 3318.0 are classified as weak, alongside uncached memory read bandwidth of 28.05 GB/sec and write bandwidth of 23.62 GB/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation provides predictable compute resources for moderate workloads, though the lack of hyperthreading limits parallel execution density. Given its balanced resource ratio and average performance in single-threaded tasks, this instance is appropriate for general-purpose applications, static web serving, light text processing, and small-scale LLM inference tasks where multi-threaded throughput is not the primary bottleneck.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B x86_64 processor running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show average results for single-core execution, including a Geekbench single-core score of 1558.0 and stable static web serving throughput of 6.25 GB/sec. However, multi-core and memory bandwidth benchmarks, such as a multi-core Geekbench score of 3318.0 and uncached memory read speeds of 28.05 GB/sec, fall into the lower tier. This resource profile offers predictable single-threaded compute capacity, making it suitable for general-purpose workloads, static web serving, and lightweight text processing, while representing a tradeoff for highly parallelized or memory-bound applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average single-core but weaker multi-core benchmark performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated four-core Intel Xeon instance offering a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio for predictable single-threaded general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.7 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage
Average single-core performance contrasted with weaker multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics
Appropriate for static web serving, light text processing, and small-scale inference
